title: Responsive Modal

statement.markdown:
heading: Create a Responsive Modal
text: Create a modal that adapts to different screen sizes. The modal should have a close button and a title. When the modal is open, it should cover the entire viewport. Use Tailwind CSS classes for styling.

constraints: The modal should be centered horizontally and vertically in the viewport.
The modal should be fully responsive and work on different screen sizes.
The close button should be accessible and easy to click.
The title should be displayed in a clear and readable font.
